info.name: Kameleon — tRPC Endpoints (MCP)
info.description:
Todos los procedures tRPC usados por el MCP.

GET = trpcQuery, input como ?input=JSON
POST = trpcMutation, body JSON directo (sin wrapper batch)

X-Tenant-Slug se inyecta via pre-request script.

request.description: Authenticate with email/password. Returns session token (also sets it for subsequent calls). If MFA is enabled returns a challenge instead.
Get the current authenticated user with memberships and tenant info.
Check if the current session is valid.
List all workflows for the tenant.
Get a workflow with its states and transitions.
List work item types available in the tenant. Use this to get the typeId needed when creating work items.
List methodologies available in the tenant.
Create a workflow.
Update a workflow.
Delete a workflow.
Duplicate a workflow (copies states and transitions).
Add a state to a workflow.
Update a workflow state.
Delete a workflow state.
Reorder workflow states.
Add a transition between workflow states.
Delete a workflow transition.
Auto-generate transitions between all states in a workflow.
Create a work item type.
Get a methodology by ID.
Duplicate a methodology for customization.
Create a work item (task/ticket/bug) in a project. Requires projectId and typeId (get types from kameleon_workflows_list_work_item_types).
List work items in a project with optional filters.
Get a work item by ID.
Get a work item by its key (e.g. 'PROJ-123').
Get work items assigned to the current user across all projects.
Update a work item.
Transition a work item to a new workflow state.
Permanently delete a work item.
Archive a work item.
Search work items by title/key in a project (max 10 results).
Add a subtask to a work item.
Toggle a subtask completion.
List subtasks for a work item.
Remove a subtask.
List comments on a work item.
Add a comment to a work item.
Delete a comment.
Create a dependency link between two work items.
List links for a work item.
Get workflow config (types, states, transitions) for a project. Essential for knowing which typeId/stateId to use when creating work items.
Restore an archived work item.
Add a user as a watcher on a work item.
Remove a watcher from a work item.
List watchers of a work item.
Watch a work item (current user).
Unwatch a work item (current user).
List attachments of a work item.
Add an attachment record to a work item.
Delete an attachment from a work item.
List financial entries for a work item.
Add a financial entry to a work item.
Delete a financial entry from a work item.
Get aggregated financial summary for a work item.
Remove a dependency link between work items.
List projects with optional search, methodology filter, and pagination.
Get a project by ID.
Create a new project.
Update project details.
Archive a project.
Permanently delete a project.
List members of a project.
Add a member to a project.
Remove a member from a project.
List containers (phases, sprints, epics, milestones) in a project.
Create a container (phase, sprint, epic, milestone, etc.) in a project.
Update a container.
Get the hierarchical container tree of a project.
Restore an archived project.
Close a container.
Reorder containers in a project.
Delete a container.
Toggle project pin status for the current user.
Change a project's display color.
Duplicate a project (copies settings, not work items).
Get project statistics (tasks, completion, overdue).
Create a time entry for a project (optionally linked to a work item).
List time entries with optional filters.
Get time entries for the current user.
Update a time entry.
Delete a time entry.
Submit a draft time entry for approval.
Get time tracking summary for a project.
Get a time entry by ID.
Approve a submitted time entry.
Reject a submitted time entry.
Resubmit a rejected time entry.
List time entries pending approval.
Export time entries for a project.
Create a financial entry for a project.
List financial entries with filters.
Get a financial entry by ID.
Update a financial entry.
Approve a financial entry.
Mark a financial entry as paid.
Delete a financial entry.
Create a financial category.
List financial categories.
Update a financial category.
Deactivate a financial category.
Get aggregated financial summary for a project.
Get financials grouped by category.
Get financials grouped by month.
Create a new contact.
Update a contact.
Archive a contact.
Restore an archived contact.
Permanently delete a contact.
Get a contact by ID.
List contacts with filters.
List all contact tags.
Create a contact tag.
Update a contact tag.
Delete a contact tag.
Assign a tag to a contact.
Remove a tag from a contact.
Add an address to a contact.
Update a contact address.
Delete a contact address.
List notes for a contact.
Add a note to a contact.
Update a contact note.
Delete a contact note.
Invite a user to the tenant.
List memberships with optional status filter.
Update a membership's status (activate, suspend, reactivate).
Assign a role to a membership.
Admin password reset for a tenant member.
Create a new custom role in the tenant.
Update a role's name/description.
Delete a role. Cannot delete system roles.

Return the current user's effective permissions and SuperAdmin status.
Return current tenant info including subscription and enabled modules.
List all tenants the current user belongs to.

Check if a tenant name or slug is available.
List audit log events.
